sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after DOWN
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("=== Before DOWN ===")
for n in before:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")
        if n['children']:
            child = next(x for x in before if x['id'] == n['children'][0])
            print(f"    center: {child['color']}")

print("\n=== After DOWN ===")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")
        if n['children']:
            child = next(x for x in after if x['id'] == n['children'][0])
            print(f"    center: {child['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
